alkylation reagent: Carbamidomethylation of C was applied as a static modification
cleavage agent: using a combination of sequencing grade trypsin (Promega) and endopeptidase LysC (Wako Chemicals)
instrument: analyzed using a Q-Exactive HF mass spectrometer
labeling: peptides were analyzed using a Q-Exactive HF mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: eluted with buffer containing ... 1 mM TCEP
reduction concentration: eluted with buffer containing ... 1 mM TCEP
